capability_plan.action: Balance async/thread/process lanes by workload shape.
Strengthen module contracts and discovery validation.
Expand connector orchestration to leverage high-value multi-source collectors safely.
Improve indexed storage for historical correlation replay.
Extend TTL-aware cache layers for expensive enrichment calls.
Expand analyst outputs with richer graph/report artifacts.
Close regression gaps around failure paths and adapters.

recommended_plugins.title: Contact Lattice Analyzer
recommended_plugins.description: Correlates exposed emails/phones across platforms and calculates contact mesh density.

recommended_plugins.title: Cross-Platform Activity Timeline
recommended_plugins.description: Extracts public date hints across profiles to build a lightweight activity timeline.

recommended_plugins.title: Email Pattern Inference
recommended_plugins.description: Infers possible corporate mailbox formats from usernames and target domain artifacts.

recommended_plugins.title: Header Hardening Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Performs deep security-header assessment on target HTTPS response headers.

recommended_plugins.title: Identity Fusion Core
recommended_plugins.description: Aggregates confidence, mention density, and identity overlaps into a fusion index.

recommended_plugins.title: Module Capability Matrix
recommended_plugins.description: Maps plugin-like module signals from source-intel trees into scope-aware insights.

recommended_plugins.title: Orbit Link Matrix
recommended_plugins.description: Builds platform-to-domain linkage and shared outbound domain signals.

recommended_plugins.title: Signal Fusion Core
recommended_plugins.description: Runs internal connector lanes and merges normalized signals into Silica workflows.

recommended_plugins.title: Subdomain Risk Atlas
recommended_plugins.description: Classifies discovered subdomains by environment and high-risk naming patterns.

recommended_plugins.title: Threat Conductor
recommended_plugins.description: Combines correlation, issue distribution, and scan quality into an executive risk signal.
